name: Mount Hood Golf Course
about: Mount Hood Golf Course is a historic public golf venue in Melrose, Massachusetts, offering an 18-hole course within 300 acres of wooded parkland. The facility features a beautiful, historic clubhouse with three state-of-the-art Trackman Indoor Golf Simulators, open seven days a week all winter. The simulators provide a premium indoor golf experience accompanied by a bar menu with comfort food and cocktails. The course is managed by Sagamore Golf and emphasizes a welcoming atmosphere for both on-course and simulator play.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology provides accurate ball and club tracking
Comfortable indoor setting available year-round, especially during winter
On-site bar and food service for a complete social experience

food_and_drink.notes: Bar menu with comfort food options available
Top-pour cocktails available at the bar

simulator_hardware.notes: Three state-of-the-art simulators in the clubhouse

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue offers a bar menu with comfort food and top-pour cocktails, but does not mention a BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulator session.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not have specific age restrictions listed and is described as welcoming to all golfers, making it likely kid-friendly.
